arts.ttl: Nations League: Gyökeres scores four for Sweden in rout of Azerbaijan
arts.sum: Sporting forward’s nine goals make him top scorer Ukraine in promotion playoffs after win in Albania The Sweden forward Viktor Gyökeres netted four goals on Tuesday to overtake Erling Haaland as the top scorer in the Nations League. Gyökeres started the evening with five goals from five Nations League games. His third goal in the 6-0 win against Azerbaijan, in the 58th minute, took the Sporting forward to eight in this edition of the competition. Gyökeres, one of the most in-demand players in the world, did not stop after overtaking Haaland and added his fourth goal on 70 minutes. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Germany denied by last-chance penalty for Hungary in Nations League. Sweden's Gyökeres scores 4
arts.sum: Dominik Szoboszlai scored a penalty in the ninth minute of stoppage time to deny Germany a victorious end to the Nations League group stage and show why Hungary is one of the hardest places to win in world soccer. After a video review, Szoboszlai stepped up to take the penalty and chipped it over goalkeeper Alexander Nübel to salvage a 1-1 draw for Hungary, which ends Group A3 third of four teams.

arts.ttl: Man Utd scout watches Viktor Gyokeres score for Sweden as transfer chase intensifies
arts.sum: Manchester United are interested in signing Sporting star Viktor Gyokeres and sent a scout to watch him in action for Sweden as they beat Slovakia 2-1 in the Nations League
